tldr: About a dozen of your live ads say almost the exact same thing word-for-word. Meta sees these as basically one ad, so it picks a favorite and quietly stops showing the rest. You paid to make ads that almost no one is seeing.

benchmark.context: The typical brand your size ships a new ad every three weeks. The best brands do it every two. Because so many of your ads repeat the same wording, the ones that ARE fresh have to work harder to stand out.

ads.headline: No Fake Sugars. Just Real Hydration
ads.body: Ditch the sugar crash without sacrificing flavor. Strive Soda delivers bold soda taste with 0 sugar, 0 calories, and real ingredients. Try all fan-favorite flavors in the Variety Pack - your new go-to refreshment.
drivers: This exact headline and body run word-for-word on five other live ads right now.
It has been up 89 days, which is more than four times how long a fresh ad should run.
One of your other ads with the same words says '45 calories' instead of '0 calories', so a shopper who sees both won't know which is true.

ads.headline: No Fake Sugars. Just Real Hydration
ads.body: Ditch the sugar crash without sacrificing flavor. Strive Soda delivers bold soda taste with 0 sugar, 0 calories, and real ingredients. Try all fan-favorite flavors in the Variety Pack - your new go-to refreshment.
drivers: Same wording as your other 'No Fake Sugars' ads, just in a swipeable version instead of a single picture.
Sending shoppers to the Tropical flavor page while the words talk about the Variety Pack. Clicks land in the wrong place.
Running 89 days. At this age, Meta is showing it to fewer and fewer new people every day.

ads.headline: Zero Sugar. Full Flavor.
ads.body: Ditch the sugar crash without sacrificing flavor. Strive Soda delivers bold soda taste with 0 sugar, 0 calories, and real ingredients. Try all fan-favorite flavors in the Variety Pack - your new go-to refreshment.
drivers: The headline changed but the body is copied straight from your 'No Fake Sugars' ads. Meta reads them as the same ad.
Up 89 days. Older than what a top brand your size would keep live by two full months.
Nothing here says WHY someone should try it today. No offer, no urgency, no reason to click now.

ads.headline: WHY EVERYONE IS REACHING FOR STRIVE RIGHT NOW
ads.body: Some drinks feel refreshing at first… then leave you feeling heavy. Strive was made to feel different. Sweetened with honey and infused with electrolytes for hydration, it delivers crisp carbonation and balanced flavor in a lighter soda you can actually enjoy. Refreshing, easy to drink, and designed for active days. That's why more people are reaching for Strive.
drivers: This exact ad runs four times across your live ads with the same picture style and same words.
The headline is in all caps and screams a claim without backing it up. No number, no name, no proof.
76 days old. Anyone likely to buy from it already saw it and either bought or scrolled past.

ads.headline: WHY EVERYONE IS REACHING FOR STRIVE RIGHT NOW
ads.body: Some drinks feel refreshing at first… then leave you feeling heavy. Strive was made to feel different. Sweetened with honey and infused with electrolytes for hydration, it delivers crisp carbonation and balanced flavor in a lighter soda you can actually enjoy. Refreshing, easy to drink, and designed for active days. That's why more people are reaching for Strive.
drivers: A direct copy of another live ad. Meta pays one to run and quietly holds the rest back.
'Everyone is reaching for Strive' is a claim with no name, no number, no photo of anyone actually reaching for it.
76 days is more than three times your ideal life span for a fresh ad.

ads_compact.headline: Get 15% OFF now
ads_compact.body: Win $100+ Worth of Strive Soda + Get 15% OFF Today. Here's how it works: enter your email, get 15% off instantly, then place your first order to automatically enter the quarterly drawing.

ads_compact.headline: Real Flavor, Real Hydration
ads_compact.body: You shouldn't have to choose between amazing taste and better ingredients. Strive is the hydration soda with crave-worthy flavor, 100% organic wildflower honey, and electrolytes for everyday movement.

ads_compact.headline: Better Soda Starts Here
ads_compact.body: Why does Strive taste so good? It starts with 100% organic wildflower honey.  No synthetic sweeteners. No weird aftertaste.  Just full-bodied flavor with electrolytes and only 50 calories.

hero_concept.hook: The soda you can drink at 3pm without the crash.
hero_concept.headline: Peach, honey, electrolytes.
hero_concept.primary_text:
Most sodas taste great for the first sip and heavy by the last. Strive Peach was built to feel light the whole way through.

Sweetened with 100% organic wildflower honey, 180mg of electrolytes, and 45 calories a can. No sucralose, no aspartame, no stevia.

Grab a 12 pack. Free shipping on your first order.
hero_concept.visual_direction: A single chilled Strive Peach can, condensation beading, set on a sunlit wood counter with a fresh peach and honey drizzle beside it, shot from a low editorial angle.
hero_concept.fills_gap: Almost every live ad is about the Variety Pack and repeats the same 'no sugar, real hydration' line. Not one ad puts a single flavor front and center with a moment a shopper can picture. This gives you one clear product, one clear reason to buy, and something new for Meta to show.
hero_concept.image_prompt: A photorealistic editorial product photograph featuring the product from the reference image, styled in a sunlit kitchen counter scene with a fresh ripe peach cut in half and a small pool of golden honey with a wooden honey dipper beside the can, with warm morning window light casting soft directional shadows and highlighting the condensation beads on the can. Editorial commerce aesthetic, clean and premium, with a natural wood surface and a soft blurred neutral background. Square 1:1 composition with breathing room top and bottom for ad text overlay. CRITICAL - preserve the exact peach-flavor colorway and printed can artwork of the Strive Soda Peach 12 oz can exactly as shown in the reference image, including the peach/orange gradient, the Strive wordmark, all flavor text, all nutrition callouts, and every graphic element on the can - strictly NO color shift to red, pink, yellow, or any other hue, NO altering of the printed brand graphics, NO removing of text on the can. STRUCTURE - preserve the exact construction: standard 12 oz aluminum soda can silhouette with rolled top rim, pull-tab opening on top, and all printed graphics, wordmarks, flavor names, ingredient callouts, and nutrition text on the can body exactly as they appear in the reference image. Do NOT change can shape or size, do NOT add or remove any printed element, do NOT alter any text or graphic on the can, do NOT introduce a second can or duplicate. Render the product's metal, color, finish, fabric, weave, stones, surface treatment, AND every visible construction detail (silhouette, closures, hardware count, pockets, sleeves, neckline, printed graphics) EXACTLY as they appear in the reference image. Do NOT change the metal type, do NOT shift the color temperature, do NOT introduce tones not present in the reference, do NOT add or remove buttons, snaps, zippers, pockets, straps, or any hardware, do NOT alter the silhouette, do NOT remove or modify printed graphics or text on the garment. IMPORTANT: the 'no text' and 'no logos' items in the NEGATIVE list below apply ONLY to text or logos added as overlay to the photograph itself - text, logos, graphics, prints, and brand labels that exist ON the product in the reference image are part of the product and must be preserved exactly. Premium commerce photography quality. NEGATIVE: no overlay text added to the photograph, no overlay logos added to the photograph, no watermarks, no UI elements, no Facebook interface, no clickable buttons, no faces, no models, no collage, no borders, no duplicate products, no color shift, no metal swap, no silver-to-gold or gold-to-silver conversion, no warm-tone bias on cool metals, no recoloring of fabric or stones, no pattern modifications, no removing or replacing the product's printed graphics, no extra hardware not present in reference, no added pockets or pleats, no silhouette alterations, no design modifications.

next_step.urgency: About six of your ads stop working in the next week or two. The copied wording is the reason.
next_step.headline: Walk through the Strive Soda refresh plan with Kyle
next_step.body:
Friend, in this 30 min call, we'll map out:
• 3 customer avatars at your price point
• The motivational hook driving each
• A 30-day creative + spend roadmap (to outbeat your current ROAS)

Yours to keep - work with us or don't.

method_note: Based only on your public Facebook and Instagram ads: the pictures, the words, and how long each one has been running. No access to your account or private numbers.
